title: Sworn Relation of Norquist

sections.body:
Worked in the office until late. Did not see Halla after dinner. I spent the evening reviewing the seasonal budget lines. Someone has been accessing the restricted historical expedition files without authorization, but I could not trace the source.

Set down under oath, and therefore no safer than any other vanity of men. The constables disputed the matter till dawn: whether the witness erred, dissembled, or sought by falsehood to shield a greater villainy.

The margin is cleaner than the tale; that alone should give a sober mind pause. The desk-note beneath it read only: “keep apart from the louder papers.”

subtitle: Desk mark: doubtful. The same mark is set upon papers later proved sound.
